non-root-port.with_evidence: containerPort: 8080, Service port: 80 targetPort: 8080, runAsNonRoot: true

resource-limits.with_evidence: requests: cpu: 250m, memory: 256Mi; limits: cpu: 500m, memory: 512Mi

selector-mismatch.with_evidence: Service selector app.kubernetes.io/name: api-server matches pod labels

secrets-in-configmap.with_evidence: DATABASE_URL moved to Secret with secretKeyRef, removed from ConfigMap

security-context-pod.with_evidence: runAsNonRoot: true, runAsUser: 1000, seccompProfile: type: RuntimeDefault

dedicated-service-account.with_evidence: ServiceAccount api-server-sa created, serviceAccountName: api-server-sa on pod spec

least-privilege-rbac.with_evidence: Namespaced Role with rules: get/list/watch on configmaps/secrets, RoleBinding instead of ClusterRoleBinding

hpa-needs-requests.with_evidence: Container has resource requests (cpu: 250m, memory: 256Mi) so HPA can compute utilization

netpol-egress-missing.with_evidence: policyTypes: - Ingress - Egress, with explicit egress rules to postgres:5432

netpol-allow-all-ingress.with_evidence: ingress restricted to podSelector matchLabels app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend on port 8080

ingress-tls.with_evidence: annotations: cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: letsencrypt-prod, tls: hosts: api.example.com secretName: api-tls

default-namespace.without_evidence: All resources still use namespace: default
